name: Privacy Dashboard View Model And UI
purpose: Wire the /privacy dashboard to a real read-only view model and UI using existing settings/privacy read helpers while preserving Phase 20 privacy, export, memory, connector, Spotify, manual workout, deferred connector, audit, and Carnos boundaries.

schema_requirement.reason: 20Y uses existing discovered settings and privacy read helpers. It does not create migrations, connector tables, Spotify account tables, export tables, action review tables, audit writes, token storage, or provider calls.
schema_requirement.runtime_boundary: The UI is read-only and status-only. Any future write action, connector account storage, export generation, destructive manifest, token storage, action review persistence, or audit insertion requires schema inspection before coding.

ui_sections: existing memory audit usage transparency panel
read_only_guards: No direct setting mutation is added.
No Spotify OAuth route is added.
No Spotify provider call is added.
No Carnos runtime action is added.
acceptance: The existing /privacy route renders the new Phase 20Y dashboard UI.
The route still reads app settings and privacy settings with existing helpers.
A privacy dashboard view model builder exists.
The UI displays Phase 20 cards for memory, private mode, export, destructive action, sensitive locks, audit, Spotify, media permissions, manual workout logging, and deferred connectors.
The UI clearly marks Spotify as boundary-only and token-hidden.
The UI clearly marks Garmin and health connectors as deferred.
The UI clearly marks Echo/Alexa as excluded from Phase 20.
